---
title: "Case 36-2025: 55 歲女性呼吸困難、疲勞與消化道出血"
subtitle: "Case 36-2025: 55 歲女性呼吸困難、疲勞與消化道出血"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2025-12-17
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

## 1. 自學方案

本文件為搭配《New England Journal of Medicine》病例報告《Case 36-2025: A 55-Year-Old Woman with Dyspnea, Fatigue, and Gastrointestinal Bleeding》(*N Engl J Med* 2025;393:2460-8) 而製作，請先取得該文稿後搭配本文件自學。已有基礎的同事，請直接跳至考題處進行自我測驗。

---

## 2. 病例概述

### 2.1 臨床表現

一位 55 歲女性因反覆 rectal bleeding（直腸出血）及 shortness of breath（呼吸短促）至 Massachusetts General Hospital 就診。

### 2.2 病史時序

| 時間點 | 重要事件與發現 |
|--------|---------------|
| 6 個月前 | 首次出血發作：hematochezia（血便）；Hemoglobin 8.0 g/dL；MCV 正常；colonoscopy 發現 internal hemorrhoids，無 masses、ulcers 或 polyps；開始 oral iron 治療 |
| 3 個月前 | 第二次出血發作：hematochezia；Hemoglobin 6.4 g/dL；MCV 73 fL；WBC 3700/μL（輕度 leukopenia）；Ferritin 5 μg/L；Transferrin saturation 3%；輸血 2 units pRBC + IV iron；EGD with enteroscopy 至 proximal jejunum 正常；出血自行停止 |
| 2.5 個月前 | 門診追蹤：video-capsule endoscopy reportedly negative；開始 scheduled iron infusions |
| 2 個月前 | 第三次出血發作：recurrent hematochezia 伴 fatigue；Hemoglobin 6.8 g/dL；SPEP 正常；Free kappa/lambda light chains 正常；Copper, lead, zinc levels 正常；輸血 1 unit pRBC + IV iron |
| 現次入院 | 第四次出血發作：melena（黑便）；Hemoglobin 6.5 g/dL；WBC 3170/μL；Platelet 144,000/μL；PT 13.9 sec；INR 1.2 |

### 2.3 重要病史

| 類別 | 內容 |
|------|------|
| Past Medical History | Seronegative ocular myasthenia gravis；symptomatic premature ventricular complexes（已接受 cardiac ablation） |
| Surgical History | Cholecystectomy（20 年前）：併發 bile duct laceration，接受 open repair 及 hepaticojejunostomy；appendectomy（4 年前） |
| Medications | 無固定用藥；not taking NSAIDs or dietary supplements |
| Social History | 已婚，與丈夫及成年子女同住；不抽菸、不飲酒、無 recreational drug use；退休教育工作者；無近期旅遊史 |
| Family History | 無 liver disease、bleeding disorders 或 cancer 家族史 |

### 2.4 理學檢查

| 項目 | 發現 |
|------|------|
| Vital Signs | Temperature 36.1°C；BP 99/55 mmHg；HR 61 bpm；RR 16/min；SpO2 99% on room air |
| General | Weight 85 kg；BMI 30 |
| Skin | Pale but not jaundiced |
| Abdomen | Soft and nontender；no distention or palpable organomegaly |
| Stigmata of Liver Disease | No Terry's nails；no spider angiomas；no palmar erythema |

---

## 3. 影像學發現

### 3.1 CT Angiography (GI Bleeding Protocol)

- No active gastrointestinal bleeding identified
- Patent hepatic artery and superior mesenteric artery
- **Occlusion of the left portal vein** with distal reconstitution
- **Stenosis** at the junction of right portal vein and main portal vein
- **Dilated right portal vein** (poststenotic dilatation)
- **Splenomegaly**
- **Portosystemic collaterals** in hepatic hilum
- Evidence of previous hepaticojejunostomy with expected pneumobilia

### 3.2 Magnetic Resonance Cholangiopancreatography (MRCP)

| 發現 | 臨床意義 |
|------|---------|
| Atrophic caudate lobe | 提示該區域慢性血流受損或手術後變化 |
| Focal intrahepatic biliary ductal dilatation | 可能為術後結構改變 |
| Abnormal increased signal on DWI | 從 perihilar region 延伸至 hepatic veins confluence 附近，提示纖維化/發炎 |
| Abnormal delayed enhancement | 與 DWI 高訊號區域一致，支持纖維化診斷 |
| Attenuation of left and middle hepatic veins | 肝靜脈受壓或閉塞 |

### 3.3 EGD and Colonoscopy

- Erythematous mucosa and erosive gastropathy in gastric antrum
- Hyperplastic polyp
- Diverticulosis
- No vascular lesions or active bleeding identified

---

## 4. 鑑別診斷

### 4.1 臨床推理架構

> **Dr. Irun Bhan 的診斷思路：** 面對這位有複雜病史的 55 歲女性，診斷推理分為兩個主要步驟：
> 1. 確定出血的解剖位置（anatomical location）
> 2. 釐清出血的機轉（mechanistic cause）

### 4.2 確定出血來源

| 線索 | 分析 |
|------|------|
| Hematochezia | 提示 lower GI hemorrhage 或 brisk upper GI bleeding |
| Melena | 提示 upper GI source（或 proximal colon） |
| 兩者都有 | 最可能來自 upper GI tract |
| Thrombocytopenia + GI hemorrhage | 提示 underlying portal hypertension；鐵缺乏性貧血通常會導致 reactive thrombocytosis，此病人反而 thrombocytopenia — 異常！ |

### 4.3 Obscure Gastrointestinal Bleeding 的定義

> **定義：** Persistent or recurrent bleeding with no source identified on upper and lower endoscopic evaluation.

本病例：2 次 EGD（含 enteroscopy 至 proximal jejunum）、1 次 colonoscopy、1 次 video-capsule endoscopy，均未發現出血來源。

可能原因：
1. 先前檢查遺漏出血來源（如 Dieulafoy's lesion 等 subtle mucosal abnormality）
2. 出血來自尚未檢查的區域 — **Roux limb！**

### 4.4 出血機轉的鑑別診斷

| 鑑別診斷 | 支持證據 | 反對證據 |
|----------|---------|---------|
| Cirrhotic Portal Hypertension | Portal vein obstruction；splenomegaly；portosystemic collaterals | 無肝硬化危險因子；正常 liver function tests；無 stigmata of chronic liver disease |
| **Noncirrhotic Portal Hypertension** | 影像顯示 portal vein stenosis/occlusion；splenomegaly；portosystemic collaterals；thrombocytopenia；有 hepaticojejunostomy 病史 | 無 |
| **Jejunal Variceal Hemorrhage** | Roux limb 尚未被內視鏡檢查；portal hypertension 證據；collaterals near hepaticojejunostomy site | 無 |
| Cholangiocarcinoma | Biliary ductal dilatation；portal vein obstruction | 正常 bilirubin 及 ALP；無 weight loss；無 hilar mass on MRCP |
| Hemobilia | History of biliary surgery；hepaticojejunostomy | 較不可能，但需考慮 vascular-biliary fistula |
| Arterioportal Fistula | 可能造成 portal hypertension；focal vascular enlargement | 需 angiography 排除 |

### 4.5 Portal Vein Obstruction 的病因分析

> **Portal vein stenosis 最可能原因：** 20 年前 cholecystectomy 併發症後的手術後變化 — bile duct laceration 導致的 inflammation、bile leak 引起的 adhesions、慢性 fibrosis 重塑。

支持證據：
- Caudate lobe atrophy
- Perihilar region 的 abnormal signal intensity 及 delayed enhancement
- Right portal vein 的 poststenotic dilatation

---

## 5. 最終診斷

> **Dr. Irun Bhan's Diagnosis:**
> **Jejunal Variceal Bleeding due to Noncirrhotic Portal Hypertension**
>
> **Radiologic Diagnosis:**
> **Portal-vein Stenosis Causing Postsurgical Jejunal Variceal Bleeding at the Level of the Hepaticojejunostomy Site**

---

## 6. 診斷性影像與介入治療

### 6.1 Mesenteric Angiography

| 檢查 | 發現 |
|------|------|
| Celiac artery arteriogram | No active bleeding in stomach or duodenum；no arterioportal fistula involving hepatic arteries |
| SMA arteriogram | No GI bleeding；delayed portal venous phase: jejunal varices and portal vein stenosis |
| IMA arteriogram | No colonic or rectal bleeding |

### 6.2 Portal Venography

經皮經肝門脈攝影關鍵發現：
- **Severe stenosis of the portal vein**
- Contrast filling jejunal varices and cavernomas through jejunal vein
- Located at the level of hepaticojejunostomy site
- **Pressure gradient: 11 mmHg**（正常 <5 mmHg）— hemodynamically significant！

> **診斷確認：** Prehepatic, noncirrhotic portal hypertension with ectopic variceal formation

---

## 7. 治療處置

### 7.1 介入治療步驟

1. **Portal vein stenting**
   - 12-mm x 60-mm self-expanding bare-metal stent
   - Post-dilatation with 12-mm angioplasty balloon

2. **Jejunal variceal embolization**
   - Microcatheter selection of jejunal varices
   - Embolization with N-butyl-2-cyanoacrylate (NBCA) + lipiodol + tantalum powder

3. **治療效果確認**
   - Post-embolization venogram: patent stent with in-line flow from SMV to intrahepatic portal vein
   - Filling of jejunal varices stopped
   - **Pressure gradient decreased from 11 mmHg to 2 mmHg**

4. **Tract embolization**
   - Coils and absorbable gelatin pledgets
   - Prevention of hemorrhage from transhepatic access

### 7.2 後續追蹤

| 時間 | 發現與處置 |
|------|-----------|
| 術後當晚 | Fever — attributed to postembolization syndrome（無感染跡象，blood culture negative，CXR 無 pneumonia） |
| 術後第 1 天 | Hemoglobin 6.7 g/dL → 輸血 1 unit pRBC → 8.7 g/dL |
| 術後數天 | Melena abated |
| 術後第 4 天 | 出院 |
| 術後 18 天 | CT angiography: nonocclusive thrombus in distal stent；原因: size mismatch between stent and poststenotic dilatation → turbulent flow；處置: 開始 apixaban 抗凝治療 |
| 術後 2 個月 | CT angiography: 血栓縮小，stent patent |
| 術後 4 個月 | Hemoglobin 12.4 g/dL；無 further GI bleeding |
| 術後 5 個月 | MRCP: decreased perihilar hepatic enhancement，表示 varices near hepaticojejunostomy site 的 filling 減少；排除 hilar neoplasm 作為 portal vein occlusion 的原因 |

---

## 8. 英文病例報告寫作指導

### 8.1 Key Vocabulary and Expressions

| English Term | 中文翻譯 | 臨床意義 |
|-------------|---------|---------|
| Hematochezia | 血便/鮮血便 | 紅色血液經由直腸排出 |
| Melena | 黑便 | 消化過的血液，呈柏油狀 |
| Obscure GI bleeding | 隱匿性消化道出血 | 內視鏡檢查未發現來源 |
| Hepaticojejunostomy | 肝管空腸吻合術 | 膽道繞道手術 |
| Roux-en-Y | 魯氏迴路/Y 型吻合 | 外科吻合術式 |
| Portal hypertension | 門脈高壓 | 門脈壓力升高 |
| Noncirrhotic portal hypertension | 非肝硬化性門脈高壓 | 無肝硬化的門脈高壓 |
| Portosystemic collaterals | 門體側枝循環 | 門脈高壓的代償血管 |
| Ectopic varices | 異位靜脈曲張 | 非典型位置的曲張靜脈 |
| Jejunal varices | 空腸靜脈曲張 | 空腸的曲張靜脈 |
| Splenomegaly | 脾腫大 | 門脈高壓的徵象 |
| Thrombocytopenia | 血小板低下 | 可因脾腫大導致 |
| Poststenotic dilatation | 狹窄後擴張 | 血流動力學現象 |
| Cavernoma | 海綿狀血管瘤 | 側枝血管團 |
| Pneumobilia | 膽道積氣 | 膽腸吻合後正常現象 |
| Postembolization syndrome | 栓塞後症候群 | 發燒、疼痛，通常自限 |

### 8.2 病史描述的標準句型

**Opening Statement:**
> "A 55-year-old woman was admitted to this hospital because of recurrent rectal bleeding and shortness of breath."

**Temporal Sequence:**
> "The patient had been in her usual state of health until 6 months before the current presentation, when hematochezia developed."

**Prior Workup Description:**
> "She was evaluated at the emergency department of another hospital. The hemoglobin level was 8.0 g per deciliter. Colonoscopy was performed; internal hemorrhoids were detected, but no masses, ulcers, or polyps were noted."

**Imaging Findings:**
> "CT angiography showed occlusion of the left portal vein with restoration of flow in the distal segment. Associated splenomegaly was noted, along with portosystemic collaterals in the hepatic hilum."

### 8.3 鑑別診斷討論的寫作模式

1. **建立診斷框架：** "I will approach this patient's case by attempting to establish the anatomical location of the source of bleeding and the mechanistic cause of her bleeding."
2. **分析臨床線索：** "The color of the stool can provide insight into the general location of gastrointestinal bleeding."
3. **定義臨床情境：** "The patient's presentation can be classified as obscure gastrointestinal bleeding — persistent or recurrent bleeding with no source identified on upper and lower endoscopic evaluation."
4. **提出鑑別診斷：** "Although cirrhosis accounts for the majority of cases of portal hypertensive bleeding, the possibility of noncirrhotic portal hypertension is a consideration in this patient."
5. **排除其他診斷：** "A cancer in the hilum, such as cholangiocarcinoma, should be considered... but this possibility seems unlikely on the basis of the patient's normal bilirubin and alkaline phosphatase levels."
6. **得出最可能診斷：** "The most likely cause of this patient's bleeding is a jejunal varix."

### 8.4 臨床推理的英文表達

| 中文概念 | English Expression |
|---------|-------------------|
| 這提示... | "This finding prompts consideration of..." |
| 雖然... 但... | "Although... this possibility seems unlikely on the basis of..." |
| 應強烈考慮... | "The possibility of... should be strongly considered, since..." |
| 最可能的原因是... | "The most likely cause is..." |
| 這是一個... 的例子 | "This is an example of..." |
| 可透過... 進一步調查 | "This possibility could be further investigated with..." |
| 該程序也可具有治療性 | "The procedure could also be therapeutic through..." |
| 應排除... 的可能性 | "The unlikely possibility of... could be ruled out with..." |

---

## 9. 考題

以下為針對本病例的單選選擇題，旨在檢驗對關鍵診斷與管理的理解。

1. 此病人的 GI bleeding 表現同時有 hematochezia 及 melena，最可能的出血來源位於？
   - a) Rectum
   - b) Sigmoid colon
   - c) Upper gastrointestinal tract
   - d) Ascending colon

2. 此病人雖有 iron-deficiency anemia，卻呈現 thrombocytopenia 而非 reactive thrombocytosis，最可能的解釋為？
   - a) Bone marrow suppression
   - b) Splenic sequestration due to portal hypertension
   - c) Vitamin B12 deficiency
   - d) Drug-induced thrombocytopenia

3. 此病人被歸類為 obscure gastrointestinal bleeding，主要是因為？
   - a) 出血量太少無法偵測
   - b) 上下消化道內視鏡檢查均未發現出血來源
   - c) 病人拒絕進一步檢查
   - d) 血紅素恢復正常

4. 此病人發展出 noncirrhotic portal hypertension 的最可能原因為？
   - a) Budd-Chiari syndrome
   - b) Primary biliary cholangitis
   - c) Postsurgical fibrosis from complicated cholecystectomy
   - d) Portal vein thrombosis from malignancy

5. 下列何者最支持本病例的 jejunal varices 診斷？
   - a) Elevated liver enzymes
   - b) Positive video-capsule endoscopy
   - c) Portosystemic collaterals near hepaticojejunostomy site on imaging
   - d) Presence of esophageal varices

6. 經皮經肝門脈攝影測得的壓力梯度為 11 mmHg，這代表？
   - a) 正常壓力梯度
   - b) 輕度壓力升高，無臨床意義
   - c) Hemodynamically significant stenosis
   - d) 測量誤差

7. 此病人接受的介入治療不包括下列何者？
   - a) Portal vein stenting
   - b) Jejunal variceal embolization with NBCA
   - c) TIPS (transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt)
   - d) Tract embolization with coils

8. 術後 18 天發現 stent 內 nonocclusive thrombus，最可能的原因為？
   - a) Stent infection
   - b) Size mismatch causing turbulent flow
   - c) Hypercoagulable state
   - d) Stent fracture

9. 術後 5 個月 MRCP 顯示 perihilar enhancement 減少，這代表？
   - a) 新的膽道狹窄
   - b) Varices near hepaticojejunostomy site 的 filling 減少
   - c) 肝纖維化進展
   - d) 需要再次手術

10. 關於 ectopic varices，下列敘述何者正確？
    - a) 只發生在肝硬化病人
    - b) 最常見於食道
    - c) 可發生於 portal hypertension 病人的 surgical anastomosis site
    - d) 不需要治療

---

## 9.1 考題詳解

**1. 正確答案：c) Upper gastrointestinal tract**
病人同時出現 hematochezia 和 melena，其中 melena 提示出血經過上消化道的消化過程。當上消化道大量出血時，可能因為腸道通過時間快而呈現 hematochezia。

**2. 正確答案：b) Splenic sequestration due to portal hypertension**
Iron-deficiency anemia 通常會導致 reactive thrombocytosis。然而此病人呈現 thrombocytopenia，在 portal hypertension 的情況下可因 splenic sequestration of platelets 而發生。

**3. 正確答案：b) 上下消化道內視鏡檢查均未發現出血來源**
此病人接受了 2 次 EGD（含 enteroscopy）、1 次 colonoscopy 及 1 次 video-capsule endoscopy，均未發現出血來源。

**4. 正確答案：c) Postsurgical fibrosis from complicated cholecystectomy**
20 年前 cholecystectomy 併發 bile duct laceration，導致 inflammation、adhesions 及 fibrotic remodeling。影像上的 caudate lobe atrophy 及 perihilar region 的 abnormal signal 都支持此病因。

**5. 正確答案：c) Portosystemic collaterals near hepaticojejunostomy site on imaging**
CT angiography 顯示 portosystemic collaterals in the hepatic hilum，位於 hepaticojejunostomy site 附近。

**6. 正確答案：c) Hemodynamically significant stenosis**
正常 portal vein pressure gradient 應 <5 mmHg。此病人測得 11 mmHg，確認 hemodynamically significant stenosis。治療後壓力梯度降至 2 mmHg。

**7. 正確答案：c) TIPS (transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt)**
病因是 portal vein stenosis 而非 intrahepatic portal hypertension，TIPS 並非此次治療的一部分。

**8. 正確答案：b) Size mismatch causing turbulent flow**
原文解釋 thrombus formation 與 stent 和 poststenotic dilatation 之間的 size mismatch 導致 turbulent flow 有關。

**9. 正確答案：b) Varices near hepaticojejunostomy site 的 filling 減少**
術後 5 個月 MRCP 顯示 perihilar hepatic enhancement 減少，表示治療成功減少了靜脈曲張的充血，同時排除 hilar neoplasm。

**10. 正確答案：c) 可發生於 portal hypertension 病人的 surgical anastomosis site**
Ectopic varices 可發生於任何 portal hypertension 的情況（包括 noncirrhotic），特別容易在 surgical anastomosis sites 形成。本病例即為典型例子。

---

## 10. 總結

> **Pearl 1**: Obscure GI bleeding 需考慮 altered anatomy — 有外科手術史的病人可能有標準內視鏡無法到達的區域
>
> **Pearl 2**: Thrombocytopenia in iron-deficiency anemia 是異常的 — 應提示 underlying portal hypertension
>
> **Pearl 3**: Noncirrhotic portal hypertension 可由 postsurgical fibrosis 導致，即使發生在手術後多年
>
> **Pearl 4**: Ectopic varices 可發生在任何 portal hypertensive 病人的 surgical anastomosis site
>
> **Pearl 5**: Portal venography with pressure measurement 是確認 hemodynamically significant stenosis 的關鍵診斷工具
>
> **Pearl 6**: Combined approach — portal vein stenting + variceal embolization 可有效治療此類病變

> "The possibility of bleeding from an unexamined source should be strongly considered, since this patient has altered anatomy as a result of a previous Roux-en-Y hepaticojejunostomy, and the Roux limb has not yet been observed." — Dr. Irun Bhan

---

## 11. 附錄：Portal Hypertension 分類

| 分類 | 位置 | 常見病因 |
|------|------|---------|
| Prehepatic | Portal vein / splenic vein | Portal vein thrombosis；splenic vein thrombosis；**portal vein stenosis（本病例）**；congenital atresia |
| Intrahepatic (Presinusoidal) | 肝內門脈分支 | Schistosomiasis；primary biliary cholangitis；sarcoidosis；nodular regenerative hyperplasia |
| Intrahepatic (Sinusoidal) | 肝竇 | **Cirrhosis（最常見）**；alcoholic hepatitis；acute liver failure |
| Intrahepatic (Postsinusoidal) | 中央靜脈/肝靜脈 | Veno-occlusive disease；sinusoidal obstruction syndrome |
| Posthepatic | IVC / 右心房 | Budd-Chiari syndrome；right heart failure；constrictive pericarditis |

---

## 參考文獻

1. Case Records of the Massachusetts General Hospital. Case 36-2025: A 55-Year-Old Woman with Dyspnea, Fatigue, and Gastrointestinal Bleeding. [*N Engl J Med*. 2025;393:2460-2468.](https://doi.org/10.1056/NEJMcpc2409973)

---

*本講義整理自 NEJM Case Records of the Massachusetts General Hospital*
*編輯：謝慕揚 Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD, FESC*
*僅供教學使用，請勿用於商業用途*
